prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2022年理科最低位次约1428名，2023年骤降至约5866名（受新高考改革首年影响），2024年约5705名基本持平，2025年（物理类）大幅回升至约2385名。近三年 呈现\"暴跌后快速反弹\"走势，2025年较2024年前移约3320名，显示该校在四川考生中的报考热度显著回升；2022年理科计划68人，2023年61人，2024年61人， 2025年物理类57人，2026年物理类计划增至71人，较2025年扩招14人（增幅约24.6%）。扩招幅度较大，对竞争有一定缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双 一流建设高校，哈尔滨工业大学（本部）软科主榜排名约第12位（2026年），属C9联盟成员。深圳校区共享本部声誉与学科资源，地处深圳，区位优势突出；20 26年声誉评价为中性/混合，无重大负面舆情；抖音热度总排名第10位（高热），\"国防七子\"标签在短视频平台传播广泛，报考关注度持续走高。2024年曾出现投档线异常信号 （中关注），但2025年已明显回暖；机械工程A+、材料科学与工程A+、环境科学与工程A+、力学A+、控制科学与工程A、计算机科学与技术A、软件工程A、电气 工程A、土木工程A等17个学科获评A-及以上。深圳校区招生专业覆盖计算机、电子信息、自动化、电气等核心工科方向。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电 气工程及其自动化均为2026年高热推荐专业，工科热度持续攀升。四川省2026年普通高考总人数约53.5万，较2025年（约46.3万）增加约15.5%，物理类考生估算约32.9万，竞争 基数扩大。；哈尔滨工业大学（深圳）位于广东省深圳市，对四川考生具有较强地域吸引力。该校在四川省招生占比在同类985中 较高，2025年四川招生人数占该校全国总招生比例约4.3%，属于重点生源省份。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅回升的强势走势、2026年扩招14人（+24.6%）的供给增加、 物理类考生增加约15.5%的需求变化，以及学校高热工科专业持续受追捧等因素。预测2026年物理类最低位次约2757名，区间2443-3071名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:

- 工科试验班（计算机与电子通信）（含：计算机科学与技术、通信工程、集成电路设计与集成系统、自动化、电气工程及其自动化）
- 工科试验班（未来信息）（含：计算机科学与技术、通信工程）

- 工科试验班（自主智能）（含：人工智能、机器人工程、自动化）
- 工科试验班（机器人与智能装备）
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次在2443-3071区间内，建议以二档工科试验班（自主智能/机器人与智能装备）为主攻方向，一档计算机与电子通信类作为冲刺，三档卓越优才计划作为保底。位次明显 优于区间下限（如2400名以内）可重点冲刺一档王牌计算机类专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2022, the lowest ranking for science was approximately 1428; in 2023, it sharply dropped to about 5866 (affected by the first year of the new college entrance examination reform); in 2024, it was roughly 5705, basically stable; in 2025 (Physics Category), it significantly rebounded to about 2385. The past three years show a trend of "sharp drop followed by rapid rebound". In 2025, it moved forward by about 3320 places compared to 2024, indicating a notable recovery in application popularity among Sichuan candidates. In 2022, the science enrollment plan was 68; in 2023, 61; in 2024, 61; in 2025, 57 for Physics Category; in 2026, the Physics Category plan increases to 71, an expansion of 14 places compared to 2025 (an increase of about 24.6%). The relatively large expansion helps alleviate competition to some extent.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. Harbin Institute of Technology (main campus) ranks approximately 12th on the Soft Science Main Ranking (2026) and is a member of the C9 League. The Shenzhen campus shares the reputation and disciplinary resources of the main campus, located in Shenzhen with prominent geographical advantages. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with no major negative public opinion. Douyin heat ranks 10th overall (high heat), and the "National Defense Seven Sons" label is widely spread on short video platforms, with application attention continuously rising. In 2024, there was an abnormal signal in the admission cutoff line (medium attention), but it has clearly recovered in 2025. 17 disciplines, including Mechanical Engineering A+, Materials Science and Engineering A+, Environmental Science and Engineering A+, Mechanics A+, Control Science and Engineering A, Computer Science and Technology A, Software Engineering A, Electrical Engineering A, and Civil Engineering A, are rated A- or above. The Shenzhen campus enrollment majors cover core engineering directions such as computer science, electronic information, automation, and electrical engineering.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation are all highly recommended majors for 2026, with engineering popularity continuing to rise. In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance examination candidates in Sichuan Province is about 535,000, an increase of about 15.5% compared to 2025 (about 463,000). The estimated number of Physics Category candidates is about 329,000, expanding the competition base. Harbin Institute of Technology (Shenzhen) is located in Shenzhen, Guangdong Province, which has strong regional appeal to Sichuan candidates. The proportion of enrollment in Sichuan among similar 985 universities is relatively high. In 2025, the number of students enrolled in Sichuan accounts for about 4.3% of the university's total national enrollment, making it a key source province.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the strong rebound trend in 2025 rankings, the supply increase of 14 places (+24.6%) in 2026, the demand change of about 15.5% increase in Physics Category candidates, and the continued popularity of the university's high-heat engineering majors, the predicted lowest ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is approximately 2757, with a range of 2443-3071.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Computer and Electronic Communication) (includes: Computer Science and Technology, Communication Engineering, Integrated Circuit Design and Integration, Automation, Electrical Engineering and Automation)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Future Information) (includes: Computer Science and Technology, Communication Engineering)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Autonomous Intelligence) (includes: Artificial Intelligence, Robotics Engineering, Automation)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Robotics and Intelligent Equipment)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Excellent Talent Plan) (includes: Materials Science and Engineering, Civil Engineering, Environmental Engineering, Energy and Power Engineering)
- Mathematics and Applied Mathematics (Excellent Joint Training Class)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Within the predicted ranking range of 2443-3071, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 Engineering Experimental Classes (Autonomous Intelligence/Robotics and Intelligent Equipment) as the main direction, Tier 1 Computer and Electronic Communication as a reach, and Tier 3 Excellent Talent Plan as a safety. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 2400), you can focus on reaching for the top-tier computer majors in Tier 1.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2023, the minimum ranking for liberal arts was approximately 867; in 2024, approximately 600; in 2025 (History Category), approximately 498. Rankings have moved forward for three consecutive years, with a cumulative advance of about 369 places, indicating continuously rising application popularity. In 2023, the liberal arts plan was 4 students; in 2024, 4 students; in 2025, 2 students in History Category; in 2026, the History Category plan increases to 13 students, an expansion of 11 students compared to 2025 (an increase of 550%). The expansion is extremely large, significantly alleviating competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. Harbin Institute of Technology (main campus) ranks approximately 12th on the Soft Science main list (2026). The Shenzhen campus shares the reputation of the main campus and is located in Shenzhen, which is also attractive to liberal arts candidates. In 2026, reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with high popularity on Douyin (overall ranking 10th). The "Defense Seven Sons" brand effect is biased towards engineering, but the overall brand of HIT also has some appeal to liberal arts students. The Economic Management Pilot Class corresponds to disciplines such as Business Administration and Applied Economics, with HIT's Management Science and Engineering rated A. Although the liberal arts majors at the Shenzhen campus are few, they are refined.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Social popularity of economics/management/accounting/finance majors is divided and cautious, with accounting/finance/auditing recommended. In 2026, the estimated number of History Category candidates in Sichuan is about 206,000, an increase of approximately 15.7% compared to 2025 (about 178,000). As a first-tier city, Shenzhen has strong appeal for liberal arts graduates in employment (finance, management, internet, etc.). The university's enrollment in History Category in Sichuan has expanded from 2 to 13 students, indicating increased emphasis on liberal arts students from Sichuan.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the trend of rankings moving forward for three consecutive years in History Category, the supply shock of a 550% expansion in 2026, the demand change of approximately 15.7% increase in History Category candidates, and the divided social popularity of economics/management majors, the predicted minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 is approximately 2091, with a range of 1853-2329.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: History Category only has one enrollment major, the Economic Management Pilot Class (planned 13 students), with predicted rankings in the 1853-2329 range. Due to the single major, candidates should decide whether to apply based on their own interests and career plans. Candidates within the ranking range can try, and those with rankings significantly better than the lower limit (e.g., within 1800) have a higher chance of admission.
